name: Lemon Doodles
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients. Beat at low speed, scraping the bowl often, for 2 to 4 minutes until well mixed. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake for 7 to 10 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned. Remove from the pans immediately.
